MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Cherice Jackson.
Attorney Tony Ruch appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Patrick Carter is present.
Attorney Shinichi Mac Nozaki representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A , for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of Aug -20-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
